name_cn:
Genuine Grade
🌟Full Rhinestone 3-in-1
The most beautiful and sparkling rhinestone bag. Imported rhinestone mesh, a shiny exterior, and a bling-bling effect under night lights that is very eye-catching and turns heads!! Multi-functional, the favorite part is the small bag hanging on the strap (mini bag). You'll get compliments wherever you go. This sparkling bag also pairs well with outfits. With it, you are the center of attention!
Size: 22L x 18H x 6.5W cm
Style: 1BH204 with Rhinestones
